About Portfolio Pricing Get in contact
Sites by Steph

Beautiful, custom websites designed, built, and managed for you—by Steph!

A different kind of website subscription

Tools like Squarespace, WordPress, and Canva have normalized the idea that you should make and manage your own website. But I disagree—doing those things is my job!

Via Sites by Steph, we’ll build a trustful relationship so you can rely on me to take care of all your website needs. And then you can keep your focus on whatever the website’s actually about instead!

  • 100% custom, hand-coded websites

  • Form submissions straight to your inbox

  • A professional designer on-call for edits

  • Managed hosting and domain renewal

  • Ongoing technical maintenance

Sliding scale pricing

To make Sites by Steph more accessible, I offer sliding scale pricing based on your project’s financial returns and our relationship. The Sites by Steph service is billed monthly to keep the price of a custom website sustainable for customers while still ensuring I get paid fairly for my work.

Design style research and development

The hourly rate I charge for the creative work of coming up with the appearance and structure of your website. Depending on how art direction-heavy your website needs to be, this could take us anywhere from 10 to 40 hours.

Rates $40-100/hour

Sites by Steph subscription

The monthly price of freedom from having to manage your own website! Rely on me to make any updates and edits for you. I'll also do ongoing technical maintenance and manage your domain renewal.

Rates $75-250/month

Additional website functionalities

Any functionality beyond displaying information and collecting form submissions, such as e-commerce, an events calendar, a blog you update yourself, etc., will require extra work. We can talk about your vision to estimate a price.

Rates Get in contact
Get in contact

Each site by Steph is...

  • Simple and beautiful

    I highly value beauty, and I put that care into all my designs. Every site I make has a unique look, while still staying simple and clean.

  • Effectively communicated

    People are coming to your website to learn or do something; my designs follow conventional usability heuristics to ensure that that information or process is understood by your visitors.

  • Mobile-optimized

    I design every website for both computer and phone screens to ensure all your visitors have a good experience regardless of where they view your site.

  • WCAG-compliant

    My code has been reviewed by an accessibility analyst to make sure all my websites comply with the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines.

  • Fast-loading

    Sites that take more than three seconds to load can lose up to 50% of traffic! Eep! I do my best to optimize my code so your website loads as fast as possible.

  • SEO-ready

    My websites follow best practices to build a solid foundation for getting your pages surfaced high up on search engine results.

Simple and beautiful

I highly value beauty, and I put that care into all my designs. Every site I make has a unique look, while still staying simple and clean.

Effectively communicated

People are coming to your website to learn or do something; my designs follow conventional usability heuristics to ensure that that information or process is understood by your visitors.

Mobile-optimized

I design every website for both computer and phone screens to ensure all your visitors have a good experience regardless of where they view your site.

WCAG-compliant

My code has been reviewed by an accessibility analyst to make sure all my websites comply with the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines.

Fast-loading

Sites that take more than three seconds to load can lose up to 50% of traffic! Eep! I do my best to optimize my code so your website loads as fast as possible.

SEO-ready

My websites follow best practices to build a solid foundation for getting your pages surfaced high up on search engine results.

Everyone loves Sites by Steph!

M

“Working with Steph to bring my website to life was nothing short of magical. Steph was patient, attentive, and organized at every step of the process. From understanding my vision and translating it to the DNA of the website, Steph turned one of my dreams of having my own digital home into a reality.”

Mustafa A.
B

“Steph's custom website was crucial to our fundraiser's success. The site elevated the marketing and registration for our event, and meant we didn't have to deal with Google Forms. Steph was also very responsive and helpful when we needed changes.”

Bernard W.

Let’s make the website of your dreams
